overall.description: A static nighttime scene from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) depicting a nomad camp in the desert Badlands. A group of people gather around a central bonfire with the illuminated Night City skyline and distinctive twin towers visible in the distant background. The atmosphere is cinematic with warm firelight contrasting against the cool blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert nomad camp with central bonfire

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint from ground level observing the campfire gathering and surrounding camp activities

group of seated individuals gathered around the campfire

entered.detail: burning bonfire with tall flames providing primary illumination
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
futuristic city skyline with two distinctive illuminated towers
improvised camp structure with tarp and poles
folding chairs and seating arranged around the fire pit

segments.scene_description: A static view of a desert camp at night centered on a large bonfire. Campers sit and stand around the fire while the glowing Night City skyline rises in the distant background. Palm trees frame the scene on the sides and makeshift shelters are visible in the mid-ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze over a desert nomad camp at night, contrasting the intimate warmth of a campfire with the distant, cold glow of a futuristic metropolis. It begins centered on a large, crackling bonfire where campers gather in a tight circle, their forms illuminated by the flickering orange light. As the eye drifts outward, the mid-ground reveals a scattering of makeshift shelters and rugged terrain, framed by the dark silhouettes of palm trees on either side. The scene then expands toward the horizon, where the deep blue of the night sky meets the brilliant, shimmering skyline of Night City and its towering spires.
